testcase.system-out: Input Amounts - Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Default: 70.0 Input amount is within the valid range. Valid range and default detected. Generating random value. Generated First Name: john4d2 Generated Email: nairobiPalermo62f35@gmail.com purchaseId is not null purchaseId is not empty purchaseId format is valid: 697c8791265acf56a4bf783b purchaseId length is 24 purchaseId validated successfully: 697c8791265acf56a4bf783b Clicked on ZaakPay bank select dropdown Entered partial bank name: HD
